ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance With Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mark Bridges appearing for and with Maritza Rogie. Luis Mena, executor in pro per. Mr. Bridges has not seen the order for final distribution. He is not asking the court to remove Mr. Mena. He is asking the court not to allow the statutory fees and for sanctions for failure to act in a proper manner. Oral arguments presented by both sides. Court wants both side to submit an order. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Continued To May-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Bridges appearing for Maritza Rogie, also present. Luis Mena is present. Mr. Bridges's client will not waive account. The court advised Mr. Mena to file a petition for final distribution or waiver of account by 5/22. The matter of petition for removal of personal representative is continued to 5/22.
